svg.title: AESO Interconnection Study Automation Tool — System Flowchart
svg.desc: End-to-end flowchart showing the pipeline from user launch through Excel input, PSS/E initialization, scenario loop, four study branches (Power Flow, Short Circuit, Transient Stability, PV Voltage Stability), and output generation.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How is the AESO tool launched?')
sendPrompt('What are the two modes of the AESO tool?')
sendPrompt('How does the AESO GUI work?')
sendPrompt('How does the AESO CLI work?')
sendPrompt('What does the AESO tool validate before running?')
sendPrompt('What happens if the AESO tool finds a critical validation error?')
sendPrompt('What critical errors stop the tool from running?')
sendPrompt('What does ExcelReader parse from study_scope_data.xlsx?')
sendPrompt('How does the tool initialize PSS/E?')
sendPrompt('What is a PSS/E SAV file?')
sendPrompt('How does the power flow study work?')
sendPrompt('What voltage and thermal limits does AESO use for power flow?')
sendPrompt('How are N-1 contingencies checked in power flow?')
sendPrompt('How does the short circuit study work?')
sendPrompt('What is the AESO fault current limit?')
sendPrompt('How are short circuit violations flagged?')
sendPrompt('How does the transient stability study work?')
sendPrompt('What is the rotor angle stability limit?')
sendPrompt('What is the voltage recovery criterion for transient stability?')
sendPrompt('How does the PV voltage stability study work?')
sendPrompt('How is voltage collapse detected in PV stability?')
sendPrompt('What do Cat A and Cat B mean for PV stability?')
sendPrompt('How does the AESO tool iterate over scenarios?')
sendPrompt('What output files does the AESO tool produce?')
sendPrompt('What is in the consolidated summary report?')

svg.text: Legend — click any node for detail
